text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Damn. My lap times are getting worse. I might've
consumed some unnecessary calories.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I have to say I'm surprised that even you
can't resist the allure of tasty treats.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why? It's only natural that I find glutamate and
inosinate as delicious as the next person.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Consuming glucose causes insulin to be released,
increasing serotonin production.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see. Essentially, you have the same desires as
ordinary people on some level.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have the perfect medicine to take off the
extra weight. Simply take one tablet a day and—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't think so. All I need to do is steer
clear of high-calorie food. Now, cut it out with
that stuff. You're gettin' on my nerves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Air Shakur manages to get back to her
previous weight through careful management of
her food intake.
